channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us

item.title: An Australia police officer who shocked a 95-year-old woman with a Taser is guilty of manslaughter
item.description: SYDNEY, Australia (AP) — A police officer who shocked a 95-year-old nursing home resident with a Taser was found guilty of manslaughter in an Australian court Wednesday. A jury found Kristian James Samuel White guilty in the trial in Sydney after 20 hours of deliberation.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Namibia votes for president and the chance for its first female leader
item.description: WINDHOEK, Namibia (AP) — A 72-year-old woman who joined Namibia's independence movement in the 1970s is a strong contender to become its first female leader as the country votes in a presidential election on Wednesday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Long-sought court ruling restores Oregon tribe's hunting and fishing rights
item.description: LINCOLN CITY, Ore. (AP) — Drumming made the floor vibrate and singing filled the conference room of the Chinook Winds Casino Resort in Lincoln City, on the Oregon coast, as hundreds in tribal regalia danced in a circle.
item.dc:creator: CLAIRE RUSH, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Trump promised mass deportations. Educators worry fear will keep immigrants' kids from school
item.description: Regardless of whether President-elect Donald Trump follows through on his pledge to deport millions of immigrants, educators around the U.S. are bracing for upheaval.
item.dc:creator: Bianca Vázquez Toness, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Fugitive on FBI's 'Most Wanted Terrorist' list captured after more than 20 years on run
item.description: Daniel Andreas San Diego, a fugitive on the FBI’s “Most Wanted Terrorist” list, was captured in the United Kingdom on Monday after more than 20 years.
item.dc:creator: Filip Timotija, KRON4

item.title: Trump taps Kevin Hassett as National Economic Council head
item.description: President-elect Trump has chosen former White House economic adviser Kevin Hassett to lead the National Economic Council in his next administration, he said Tuesday. “I am very pleased to announce that Dr. Kevin A.
item.dc:creator: Tara Suter, NewsNation

item.title: Fired workers blamed for knocking over 120 headstones at Tennessee cemetery
item.description: More than 120 headstones at a Tennessee cemetery were knocked over by freshly fired employees, according to the cemetery's owner.
item.dc:creator: Shay Arthur, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Very cold air arrives after Thanksgiving
item.description: High temperatures today were much different than yesterday's highs around 60°. Highs reached only the low 40s, much closer to seasonal averages. For the evening, we're experiencing temperatures falling out of the 40s and into the 30s. By morning, we'll be as low as the low 30s.
item.dc:creator: Nicholas Ferreri, NewsNation

item.title: Police say FBI agent sexually assaulted 2 women after promise of free tattoos, modeling
item.description: GAITHERSBURG, Md. (AP) — An FBI agent charged in Maryland with sexually assaulting two women contacted his alleged victims through social media with a promise to give them free tattoos and modeling work, police said Tuesday as they encouraged other potential victims to come forward.
item.dc:creator: MICHAEL KUNZELMAN, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Trump vows tariffs over immigration. What the numbers say about border crossings, drugs and crime
item.description: President-elect Donald Trump is threatening tariffs on Mexico and Canada as he seeks to portray them as responsible for illegal immigration and drug smuggling.
item.dc:creator: Rebecca Santana, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: San Francisco watchdog Ricci Wynne arrested, suspected of pimping
item.description: Wynne has legions of social media followers. Over the past three years, videos posted on his social media pages, RawRicci415, garnered hundreds of thousands of views.
item.dc:creator: Amy Larson, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Tim Walz accepts turkey presentation as he eases back into his duties as Minnesota's governor
item.description: ST. PAUL, Minn. (AP) — As feathers flew, Tim Walz accepted the symbolic presentation of a turkey Tuesday as he eases back into his duties as Minnesota's governor following the Harris-Walz ticket's defeat in the presidential election.
item.dc:creator: STEVE KARNOWSKI, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Dog treats distributed to Florida recalled for potential salmonella
item.description: A chicken-based dog treat sold online and in stores across 19 states has been recalled over the potential risk of salmonella.
item.dc:creator: Carlos Mathis, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Israel, Lebanon's Hezbollah agree to a ceasefire to end nearly 14 months of fighting
item.description: Israel approved a United States-brokered ceasefire agreement with Lebanon's Hezbollah on Tuesday, setting the stage for an end to nearly 14 months of fighting linked to the ongoing war in the Gaza Strip.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: HIV-positive organ transplants allowed under new rule
item.description: People with HIV will soon be permitted to receive transplanted kidneys and livers from donors who are also infected with the virus under a new rule approved by the Biden administration.
item.dc:creator: Sarah Fortinsky, WGN 9

item.title: Rudy Giuliani draws rebuke for a courtroom outburst accusing judge in assets case of being unfair
item.description: In an angry outburst in a New York courtroom, Rudy Giuliani has accused a judge of making wrong assumptions about him after ordering him to turn over most of his assets to two election poll workers who won a libel case against him.
item.dc:creator: Larry Neumeister, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Surveillance tech advances by Biden could aid in Trump's promised crackdown on immigration
item.description: President-elect Donald Trump will return to power next year with a raft of technological tools at his disposal that would help deliver his campaign promise of cracking down on immigration — among them, surveillance and artificial intelligence technology that the Biden administration already uses to
item.dc:creator: Sarah Parvini, Garance Burke And Jesse Bedayn, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Virginia pilot, dog killed in New York plane crash; 2 other dogs found alive
item.description: A Virginia pilot and a rescue dog he was transporting were killed after a plane he was flying crashed in New York on Sunday, authorities said.
item.dc:creator: Jenny Gable, Fox 5

item.title: Missing man's body found on roof of California business
item.description: A man who was hired to do work on the roof of a California business died while on the job and his body was believed to be on top of the building for several days, including during a popular street fair.
item.dc:creator: Travis Schlepp, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Drought is causing saltwater to creep up the Delaware River. Here's what's being done about it
item.description: TRENTON, N.J. (AP) — Salty oceanwater is creeping up the Delaware River, the source for much of the drinking water for Philadelphia and millions of others, brought on by drought conditions and sea level rise, and prompting officials to tap reservoirs to push the unpotable tide back downstream.
item.dc:creator: MIKE CATALINI and BRITTANY PETERSON, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Lauren Boebert Cameo page disappears amid House ethics concerns
item.description: Rep. Lauren Boebert (R-Colo.) briefly offered videos on Cameo, a website on which public figures sell personalized videos to fans, before the page went offline amid questions about whether it would have violated House ethics rules.
item.dc:creator: Emily Brooks, NewsNation

item.title: Veteran living in driveway after hurricanes Helene, Milton destroyed home
item.description: A U.S. Army veteran is grappling with his new reality after Helene and Milton destroyed his New Port Richey home.
item.dc:creator: Linnie Supall, NewsNation

item.title: Tank explodes, catches fire near GM facility in Michigan
item.description: A tank containing byproducts from oil drilling operations exploded and caught fire Tuesday near the General Motors Proving Ground in southeastern Michigan, damaging two nearby homes but causing no injuries, a fire chief said.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: TD Bank's historic $3B money laundering case rocks financial world as more charges possible
item.description: TD Bank fined $3 billion in money-laundering fiasco that allowed organized crime to transfer hundreds of millions without being reported under federal regulation.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Here's where Trump's criminal cases stand
item.description: President-elect Trump’s legal strategy of delay is paying off, with his election victory changing the trajectory of his four criminal prosecutions.
item.dc:creator: Zach Schonfeld, WGN 9

item.title: Couple charged in ring suspected of stealing $1 million in Lululemon clothes
item.description: A Connecticut couple has been charged in Minnesota with being part of a shoplifting ring suspected of stealing around $1 million in goods across the country.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: What Black Friday's history tells us about holiday shopping in 2024
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — The holiday shopping season is about to reach full speed with Black Friday, which kicks off the post-Thanksgiving retail rush later this week.
item.dc:creator: WYATTE GRANTHAM-PHILIPS, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Philadelphia teenagers charged in series of 'unprovoked' attacks within an hour
item.description: Six teenagers were charged in a series of what investigators described as "unprovoked" attacks around Philadelphia, Pennsylvania, that happened within an hour.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: New details emerge on BioLab fire that forced thousands to shelter outside Atlanta
item.description: ATLANTA (AP) — Federal authorities have released an update on the investigation into fires at the BioLab chemical plant near Atlanta that produced a toxic chemical cloud and forced nearby residents to shelter in place. The fires broke out Sept.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Salad topping sold in 22 states — including Utah — recalled over wrong ingredient
item.description: The packagers should contain tortilla strips but instead, consumers have found crispy onion strips inside.
item.dc:creator: Danielle Langenfeld, ABC 4
